summary: Comprehensive testing of data integrity bug fixes in crowd management app. All 14 backend tests passed. All 6 features verified working. Employee deletion cascade, update sync, AlertDialog confirmations, task stats date filtering, and WebSocket permissions broadcast all functioning correctly.

employee_deletion_cascade.description: Deleting an employee correctly cascades to delete the user account in 'users' collection and cleans up related data in tasks, monthly_schedules, and alerts collections

employee_recreation.description: After deleting an employee with national_id X, creating a new employee with the same national_id creates a fresh user account
employee_recreation.note: Backend test confirms delete cascade removes user, allowing clean re-creation

employee_update_sync.description: Editing an employee's name correctly syncs to the users collection

delete_confirmation_dialogs.description: No window.confirm() exists in codebase. All delete actions use AlertDialog/Dialog components from shadcn/radix
verification: DailySessionsPage.jsx uses AlertDialog with deleteZoneConfirm and deletePrayerConfirm state
UI testing confirmed Dialog overlay appears (not browser native confirm)

websocket_permissions_broadcast.description: /api/admin/role-permissions pattern is mapped to 'permissions' channel in CHANNEL_MAP

task_stats_date_filter.description: GET /api/tasks/stats accepts work_date and month query parameters

login_flow.description: Admin login with identifier admin@crowd.sa and password admin123 works correctly

employee_crud.description: Full CRUD operations for employees work end-to-end

seed_data_creation: Test employees created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All data integrity bug fixes verified. No mocked APIs. App uses Arabic as primary language. Backend uses motor async driver for MongoDB. All backend routes prefixed with /api.
bugs_fixed_by_main_agent: Employee delete now cascades to users, tasks, monthly_schedules, and alerts collections
Employee update now syncs name and department to the users collection
Replaced all window.confirm() with AlertDialog components
Added /api/admin/role-permissions regex pattern to WebSocket CHANNEL_MAP
Added work_date and month query parameters to tasks/stats endpoint
